title: Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) improvements
body:
* **Embedded compute credentials**: Compute credentials are now embedded for all users of a Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space). These credentials are embedded when a Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space) author changes the attached warehouse in the Genie Agent (formerly Genie Space).
* **Paginated column lists**: Column lists in the Configure tab are now paginated for improved usability, especially for rendering tables with many columns.
* **Tag search**: Tag search is now supported for Genie Agents (formerly Genie Spaces), allowing users to find spaces by their assigned tags.
